scripts.audit:hono: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js --audit-compat tests/compat/hono/smoke.ts --alias hono/tiny=vendor/hono/src/preset/tiny.ts
scripts.audit:hono-basic: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js --audit-compat tests/compat/hono/basic-smoke.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts
scripts.audit:hono-jsx-ssr: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js --audit-compat vendor/hono-examples/jsx-ssr/src/index.tsx --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/html=vendor/hono/src/helper/html/index.ts
scripts.build:hono-basic-example: npm run build:frontend && cargo run -q -p tinytsx -- build vendor/hono-examples/basic/src/index.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/basic-auth=vendor/hono/src/middleware/basic-auth/index.ts --alias hono/etag=vendor/hono/src/middleware/etag/index.ts --alias hono/powered-by=vendor/hono/src/middleware/powered-by/index.ts --alias hono/pretty-json=vendor/hono/src/middleware/pretty-json/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --api hono/basic-auth=tests/compat/hono/basic-auth-api.d.ts --api hono/etag=tests/compat/hono/etag-api.d.ts --api hono/powered-by=tests/compat/hono/powered-by-api.d.ts --api hono/pretty-json=tests/compat/hono/pretty-json-api.d.ts --output dist/hono-basic-example
scripts.build:hono-jsx-ssr-example: npm run build:frontend && cargo run -q -p tinytsx -- build vendor/hono-examples/jsx-ssr/src/index.tsx --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/html=vendor/hono/src/helper/html/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --api hono/html=tests/compat/hono/html-api.d.ts --output dist/hono-jsx-ssr-example
scripts.build:hono-node-server-example: npm run build:frontend && cargo run -q -p tinytsx -- build examples/hono-node-server/server.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --output dist/hono-node-server-example
scripts.build:tiny-serve-example: npm run build:frontend && cargo run -q -p tinytsx -- build examples/tiny-serve/server.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --output dist/tiny-serve-example
scripts.build:ai-hono: npm ci --prefix tests/compat/ai && npm run build:frontend && node tests/compat/ai/build-native.mjs
scripts.build:ai-hono-stream: npm ci --prefix tests/compat/ai && npm run build:frontend && TINYTSX_AI_ENTRY=tests/compat/ai/hono-stream-text-smoke.ts TINYTSX_AI_OUTPUT=dist/ai-hono-stream TINYTSX_AI_PORT=39452 node tests/compat/ai/build-native.mjs
scripts.build:ai-hono-provider: npm ci --prefix tests/compat/ai && npm run build:frontend && TINYTSX_AI_ENTRY=tests/compat/ai/hono-local-provider-smoke.ts TINYTSX_AI_OUTPUT=dist/ai-hono-provider TINYTSX_AI_PORT=39454 node tests/compat/ai/build-native.mjs
scripts.test:ai-intake: npm ci --prefix tests/compat/ai && npm run build:frontend && frontend/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tests/compat/ai/tsconfig.json && node --test tests/compat/ai/intake.test.mjs tests/compat/ai/generate-text.behavior.test.mjs tests/compat/ai/native-compile.test.mjs
scripts.test:zod-openapi: npm ci --prefix tests/compat/zod-openapi && npm run build:frontend && node frontend/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tests/compat/zod-openapi/tsconfig.json && node --test tests/compat/zod-openapi/native.test.mjs
scripts.try:compile:hono: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js tests/compat/hono/smoke.ts --alias hono/tiny=vendor/hono/src/preset/tiny.ts --api hono/tiny=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts
scripts.try:compile:hono-basic: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js tests/compat/hono/basic-smoke.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts
scripts.try:compile:hono-jsx-ssr: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js vendor/hono-examples/jsx-ssr/src/index.tsx --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/html=vendor/hono/src/helper/html/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --api hono/html=tests/compat/hono/html-api.d.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:env-native && npm run test:fs-native && npm run test:actors-native && npm run test:hono-actor-multi-reference && npm run test:sqlite-reference && npm run test:hono-sqlite-wal-reference && npm run test:sqlite-native && npm run test:hono-intake && npm run test:hono-alpha-native && npm run test:hono-user-auth && npm run test:hono-basic-reference && npm run test:hono-body-limit-reference && npm run test:hono-request-id-reference && npm run test:hono-json-body-native && npm run test:hono-json-body-reference && npm run test:node-server-reference && npm run test:hono-jsx-reference && npm run test:test262-intake && npm run test:test262-native && npm run test:wpt-intake && npm run test:wpt-native && npm run test:benchmarks && npm run test:wasm && cargo test --workspace
